title: [PrepareForEmission] Clone constant op when bounded by sv.bind

features.name: sv_bind with constant operand
features.description: Code should include an sv.bind operation with a constant expression operand that causes wire spilling during emission

features.name: constant wire used in reset logic and bind instance
features.description: Code should include a wire initialized from a constant that is used both in an always @(posedge) reset block and in a bind instance port connection
